data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.info in blocks-tax-reporting context — status badge for informational tax filing messages (e.g., draft saved, schedule generated). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.warning in blocks-tax-reporting context — status badge for non-blocking filing concerns (e.g., approaching deadline, missing optional schedule). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.error in blocks-tax-reporting context — status badge for blocking filing failures (e.g., unbalanced figures, missing required line). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.critical in blocks-tax-reporting context — status badge for filing-integrity-impacting failures (e.g., e-file rejection, audit-trail gap). Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.save in blocks-tax-reporting context — pilot string for the cluster-A cascade proof. UI button or status label when persisting a tax report draft. Imperative; sentence case. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates in-progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.cancel in blocks-tax-reporting context — dismiss/abort button on tax report forms and dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.retry in blocks-tax-reporting context — retry button after a render or e-file submission failure. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] state.loading in blocks-tax-reporting context — empty-state placeholder while fetching report data. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis (single character); translators preserve the convention.
